items.title: Taming Outlier Tokens in Diffusion Transformers
items.summary_en: This paper addresses the problem of outlier tokens—high-norm tokens that capture disproportionate attention with limited local information—in Diffusion Transformers for image generation, showing they occur in both pretrained ViT encoders and the denoiser network, and that simply masking them fails because the issue stems from corrupted local patch semantics. The authors propose Dual-Stage Registers (DSR), which inserts trained registers into the encoder and recursively applies a register at test time in the denoiser, effectively restoring attention dynamics and improving generation
items.summary_zh: 本文聚焦于扩散Transformer（DiT）在图像生成中出现的离群token问题，发现其不仅由少数高范数值引起，更与局部语义损坏密切相关，简单的遮盖方法无效。为此提出双阶段寄存器（DSR）方法，分别在编码器和去噪器中注入可训练或递归测试时寄存器，有效修复被破坏的局部表示。该工作揭示了生成模型中注意力异常的内在机理，为提升DiT的生成质量和语义一致性提供了重要解决方案。
items.title_en: Taming Outlier Tokens in Diffusion Transformers

items.title: LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents
items.summary_en: Long-horizon search agents often suffer from bloated working contexts that increase costs and errors. LongSeeker introduces Context-ReAct, a unified reasoning-and-tool-use loop with five atomic operations (Skip, Compress, Rollback, Snippet, Delete) that let agents adaptively reshape their context—compressing resolved information, discarding unhelpful branches, and preserving key evidence. Crucially, the Compress operator is proven expressively complete, making this elastic orchestration a principled and practical solution for robust, cost-effective long-horizon reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 长程搜索代理面临工作上下文膨胀导致成本与错误风险剧增的问题。LongSeeker 提出 Context-ReAct 弹性编排范式，赋予代理 Skip、Compress 等五种原子操作，使其能按任务相关性动态重塑上下文。这一方法让代理能自适应地保留证据、压缩冗余并抛弃无用分支，显著提升了长程任务中的效率与鲁棒性。
items.title_en: LongSeeker: Elastic Context Orchestration for Long-Horizon Search Agents

items.title: Sharp Capacity Thresholds in Linear Associative Memory: From Winner-Take-All to Listwise Retrieval
items.summary_en: This work determines the precise storage capacity of a linear associative memory under two retrieval criteria, showing that strict winner-take-all retrieval demands a logarithmic scaling d² ∼ n log n that is both achievable and necessary, driven by extreme-value noise. To bypass this bottleneck, the authors propose a relaxed listwise retrieval setting and a novel convex performance measure (Tail-Average Margin) that only requires the correct target to be among the top candidates, thereby characterizing a different, likely larger, capacity regime.
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了线性联想记忆的存储容量极限，发现容量不仅受记忆矩阵自由度制约，还取决于检索方式：在赢家通吃（top-1）检索下，存储规模必须满足 d² ∝ n log n，并证明相关矩阵记忆构造能通过尖锐相变达到这一下界，且任何线性记忆都无法超越该对数代价。进一步，针对列表检索场景，提出尾平均边际（TAM）等凸准则来刻画松弛检索下的容量阈值，揭示了检索标准如何根本性地改变存储能力的标度律。
items.title_en: Sharp Capacity Thresholds in Linear Associative Memory: From Winner-Take-All to Listwise Retrieval

items.title: Estimating the expected output of wide random MLPs more efficiently than sampling
items.summary_en: This work tackles the inefficiency of Monte Carlo sampling for estimating expected outputs of wide MLPs at initialization. It introduces a sampling-free estimator that approximates layer-wise activation distributions using cumulants and Hermite expansions, achieving much lower computational cost (FLOPs) for a given accuracy, especially for rare events. This advancement not only accelerates estimation but also enables training with reduced catastrophic tail risks.
items.summary_zh: By far the most common way to estimate an expected loss in machine learning is to draw samples, compute the loss on each one, and take the empirical average. However, sampling is not necessarily optimal. Given an MLP at initialization, we show how to estimate its expected output over Gaussian inputs
items.title_en: Estimating the expected output of wide random MLPs more efficiently than sampling

items.title: Understanding In-Context Learning for Nonlinear Regression with Transformers: Attention as Featurizer
items.summary_en: This paper tackles the theoretical gap in understanding in-context learning (ICL) for nonlinear regression with transformers, where prior work predominantly focused on linear models. The authors explicitly construct transformer networks whose attention mechanisms act as nonlinear featurizers (e.g., polynomial or spline bases) and derive finite-sample generalization error bounds that depend on context length and training set size, establishing an end-to-end analytical framework. This provides a principled theoretical foundation for ICL in nonlinear settings, advancing beyond linear assumptions and validated through synthetic experiments.
items.summary_zh: 本文研究Transformer在非线性回归中的上下文学习能力，指出注意力机制可充当“特征提取器”，显式构建多项式或样条基等非线性特征，从而将广泛函数类纳入分析框架。基于此，作者建立了端到端非线性上下文回归的有限样本泛化误差界，并通过合成数据验证了理论的正确性，为理解变换器如何实现灵活的非线性上下文学习提供了重要理论支撑。
items.title_en: Understanding In-Context Learning for Nonlinear Regression with Transformers: Attention as Featurizer

items.title: MRI-Eval: A Tiered Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Performance on MRI Physics and GE Scanner Operations Knowledge
items.summary_en: MRI-Eval addresses the lack of discriminating, vendor-specific MRI knowledge benchmarks by providing a tiered evaluation using primary multiple-choice questions and complementary stem-only / primed diagnostic conditions drawn from GE scanner manuals, textbooks, and expert sources. The benchmark enables rigorous comparison of LLMs on operational physics knowledge essential for research MRI, going beyond review-book questions where top models already saturate performance.
items.summary_zh: MRI-Eval 针对现有 MRI 大语言模型基准仅依赖通用多选题、无法区分数一数二的模型且忽略供应商特定扫描仪操作知识的问题，构建了一个分层基准，涵盖物理原理与 GE 扫描仪操作，包含 1365 个计分项目、三个难度等级和补充诊断条件。该基准通过评估五个主流模型家族，揭示了模型在专业领域知识上的相对表现，为科研 MRI 实践中 LLM 的评估与选拔提供了更精细、更具现实意义的工具。
items.title_en: MRI-Eval: A Tiered Benchmark for Evaluating LLM Performance on MRI Physics and GE Scanner Operations Knowledge

items.title: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours
items.summary_en: This work presents Design Conductor 2.0, an advanced LLM-based multi-agent system that autonomously designs complex digital hardware, tackling the challenge of scaling AI-assisted chip design. Using frontier models, it produced VerTQ—a TurboQuant inference accelerator with 5129 compute units in a 240-cycle pipeline—in just 80 hours, an 80× increase in task size over prior work. This demonstrates a path toward dramatically accelerating the creation of custom AI accelerators directly from research papers, significantly compressing hardware development cycles.
items.summary_zh: Design Conductor 2.0 利用2026年前沿模型驱动的多智能体系统，实现了完全自主的大规模硬件设计，将任务规模较前代提升80倍。其核心成果是仅用80小时即从算法论文生成了TurboQuant推理加速器“VerTQ”，包括5129个浮点运算单元和240周期定制流水线，并在FPGA上完成映射验证。这一突破表明AI agent正将硬件自动化设计推向全新高度，有望大幅缩短从算法创新到专用芯片的研发周期。
items.title_en: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours

items.title: PSK at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Ensemble Gemma Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation
items.summary_en: The paper tackles multilingual polarization detection across 22 languages by fine-tuning Gemma 3 models with LoRA and augmenting scarce training data using LLM-generated synthetic examples. Key findings show that per-language threshold tuning and weighted ensembling of 12B and 27B models significantly boost performance, achieving second place overall with a mean macro-F1 of 0.811. This approach demonstrates an effective, data-efficient strategy for improving cross-lingual text classification when labeled data is limited.
items.summary_zh: 该系统通过微调Gemma大模型并结合合成数据增强与多阶段质量过滤，有效解决了22种语言的二分类极化检测问题。关键创新在于采用三种LLM生成策略扩充数据，并对每个语种独立调优阈值及加权集成不同规模模型，无需重训即提升2–4% F1。该方法在多语种场景下取得平均宏F1 0.811的竞赛第二名成绩，验证了合成数据与语言特定微调在低资源语言情感分析中的有效性。
items.title_en: PSK at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Multilingual Polarization Detection Using Ensemble Gemma Models with Synthetic Data Augmentation

items.title: Superposition Is Not Necessary: A Mechanistic Interpretability Analysis of Transformer Representations for Time Series Forecasting
items.summary_en: This paper investigates why transformer-based time series forecasters are often rivaled by simple linear models, applying sparse autoencoders to analyze PatchTST's internal representations. The key finding is that transformer features for time series lack the "superposition" phenomenon common in NLP; even highly overcomplete dictionaries remain largely inactive with negligible performance impact, indicating naturally sparse representations. This mechanistic insight demystifies the competitiveness of linear models and suggests that large-capacity transformers may be unnecessarily complex for many forecasting tasks.
items.summary_zh: 该研究通过稀疏自编码器探究时间序列 Transformer 的表征机制，发现单层窄 Transformer 即可匹配深模型性能，且扩展字典对预测影响极小，大量维度处于非活跃状态。这表明时间序列数据不需要利用叠加等复杂特征组合，从而从机制层面解释了简单线性模型持续竞争力的原因。
items.title_en: Superposition Is Not Necessary: A Mechanistic Interpretability Analysis of Transformer Representations for Time Series Forecasting

items.title: Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents
items.summary_en: A coding-agent system for the ARC-AGI-3 abstract reasoning benchmark maintains an executable Python world model, which it verifies, refactors toward simpler abstractions (as a proxy for a simplicity bias), and uses for planning. Evaluating on 25 public games without hand-coded logic, the agent fully solved 7 and achieved a mean per-game Relative Human Action Efficiency of 32.58%. The results demonstrate that even a direct, scripted approach with world models can yield nontrivial generalization on a challenging reasoning task, highlighting the potential of coding agents for building more general AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 该系统针对 ARC-AGI-3 的抽象推理挑战，提出一种基于可执行世界模型的编码代理方法，通过持续验证、简化抽象（作为最小描述长度先验的代理）和规划来驱动行为。在 25 个公开游戏中，该代理在没有任务特定手工逻辑的情况下完全解决了 7 个游戏，并在 6 个游戏中达到超过 75% 的相对人类动作效率，展示了以世界模型和简洁性偏好为核心的通用推理系统的初步可行性。
items.title_en: Executable World Models for ARC-AGI-3 in the Era of Coding Agents

items.title: Low-Cost Black-Box Detection of LLM Hallucinations via Dynamical System Prediction
items.summary_en: This paper tackles the challenge of efficiently detecting hallucinations in large language model outputs without costly sampling or external knowledge. It models the LLM as a black-box dynamical system, embedding responses into a manifold and using Koopman operator theory to compute a differential residual score from prediction errors in factual versus hallucinated regimes. This approach yields a low-cost, adaptable hallucination detector that can be calibrated to user preferences with just a few demonstrations.
items.summary_zh: 该研究针对大型语言模型幻觉检测成本高的问题，提出了一种将模型视为黑盒动态系统的新方法。通过嵌入向量序列刻画潜在状态动态，并利用库普曼算子分别拟合事实与幻觉两种状态下的转移算子，以预测误差的差异残差作为检测信号，同时引入基于少量示例的偏好感知校准机制。这一方法无需昂贵采样或外部知识，能以低成本实现可定制的幻觉检测，对不同领域的敏感需求更具适应性和实用价值。
items.title_en: Low-Cost Black-Box Detection of LLM Hallucinations via Dynamical System Prediction

items.title: Joint Treatment Effect Estimation from Incomplete Healthcare Data: Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows with LLM-driven Evolutionary MNAR Imputation
items.summary_en: The paper addresses the joint problem of treatment effect estimation and pervasive missing-not-at-random (MNAR) data in longitudinal electronic health records. It proposes a two-stage pipeline combining CausalFlow-T—a DAG-constrained normalizing flow with LSTM-based history encoding for exact invertible counterfactual inference—and an LLM-driven evolutionary algorithm for MNAR imputation. The approach shows that explicit causal structure and exact inference resolve distinct failure modes, enabling robust causal estimation even with 50–80% missingness, which is critical for reliable target trial emulation from real-world observational healthcare data.
items.summary_zh: Target trial emulation (TTE) enables causal questions to be studied with observational data when randomized controlled trials (RCTs) are infeasible. Yet treatment-effect methods often address causal estimation, missingness, and temporal structure separately, limiting their robustness in electronic h
items.title_en: Joint Treatment Effect Estimation from Incomplete Healthcare Data: Temporal Causal Normalizing Flows with LLM-driven Evolutionary MNAR Imputation

items.title: Beyond Semantics: An Evidential Reasoning-Aware Multi-View Learning Framework for Trustworthy Mental Health Prediction
items.summary_en: This paper addresses the lack of reliable uncertainty estimation in deep learning-based mental health prediction, where models often produce overconfident predictions from ambiguous text. The key approach formulates prediction as a multi-view learning task that combines semantic representations from encoder-only models with reasoning-aware representations from decoder-only models, using Subjective Logic-based evidential learning to explicitly model uncertainty and an evidential fusion strategy. This matters because it provides trustworthy, uncertainty-calibrated predictions essential for high-stakes mental health applications.
items.summary_zh: 本文解决自动化心理健康预测在真实高风险场景中因依赖语义表示而过度自信、缺乏可靠不确定性估计的问题。作者提出一种证据推理感知的多视角学习框架，融合编码器模型的语义信息与解码器模型的推理信息，并采用主观逻辑证据学习显式建模不确定性，通过证据融合策略平衡互补信息。该方法显著提升了模型在模糊、噪声数据下的可信度和决策安全性，对风险敏感型心理健康应用尤为重要。
items.title_en: Beyond Semantics: An Evidential Reasoning-Aware Multi-View Learning Framework for Trustworthy Mental Health Prediction

items.title: Physiologically Grounded Driver Behavior Classification: SHAP-Driven Elite Feature Selection and Hybrid Gradient Boosting for Multimodal Physiological Signals
items.summary_en: This study addresses the challenge of accurately classifying driver behaviors from high-dimensional, multimodal physiological signals (EEG, EMG, GSR). It proposes an interpretable pipeline using SHAP-based elite feature selection to retain only the top 250 features, followed by Bayesian-optimized hybrid gradient boosting (XGBoost and LightGBM) in a soft-voting ensemble. This approach yields a scalable and physiologically grounded framework that enhances both predictive performance and transparency for real-world driver monitoring applications.
items.summary_zh: 本研究针对从多模态生理信号（脑电、肌电、皮电）中解码驾驶行为时面临的高维特征与可解释性挑战，提出了一种结合SHAP精英特征选择与混合梯度提升集成的框架。通过SHAP筛选关键特征并利用贝叶斯优化微调XGBoost和LightGBM，再以加权软投票融合，实现了可解释且高效的驾驶行为分类。该方法在降低计算开销的同时保留了预测性能，为安全驾驶监测提供了生理驱动、可扩展的解决方案。
items.title_en: Physiologically Grounded Driver Behavior Classification: SHAP-Driven Elite Feature Selection and Hybrid Gradient Boosting for Multimodal Physiological Signals

items.title: On the Hardness of Junking LLMs
items.summary_en: The paper investigates the computational difficulty of discovering "natural backdoors" in large language models—token sequences that trigger harmful outputs without any adversarial prompt or meaningful instruction, suggesting they are artifacts of training. By formalizing the search for these sequences as a problem of junking LLMs, it explores whether such hostile behaviors can be reliably exposed through simple optimization, which matters for understanding inherent safety risks and the potential for undetectable exploits in deployed systems.
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了大型语言模型中不依赖对抗提示、仅凭优化令牌序列即可引发有害行为的“自然后门”现象，并重点评估寻找此类后门的难度。它揭示了即使没有明确指令，训练中自然产生的令牌序列也可能触发不安全输出，这一发现对理解模型脆弱性及防御机制具有重要意义。
items.title_en: On the Hardness of Junking LLMs

items.title: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
items.summary_en: Anthropic raised usage limits for Claude to address access scalability and user demand, and struck a compute deal with SpaceX to secure additional capacity. The partnership likely provides specialized infrastructure, enabling broader deployment and more resource-intensive AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: Claude提高了使用上限并与SpaceX达成计算资源交易，旨在解决AI训练和推理的高强度算力需求。通过这次合作，Claude能获得更强大的计算基础设施，从而支持更大规模的模型迭代与更广泛的应用场景。这对加速AI前沿模型开发、降低服务限制、提升用户体验具有重要意义。
items.title_en: Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX

items.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration
items.summary_en: Anthropic’s Claude Managed Agents now integrate "dreaming" for internal world simulation, outcomes-driven reasoning, and multi-agent orchestration, addressing the need for autonomous planning and collaboration in complex tasks. These features enable agents to anticipate consequences, focus on goal completion, and coordinate workflows across multiple specialized agents. This advancement matters for building robust, scalable AI systems that can handle dynamic, multi-step real-world problems with minimal human oversight.
items.summary_zh: 该研究介绍了Claude托管代理的新功能，重点解决了自动执行复杂任务时的规划与适应性问题。通过引入“梦境”模拟（内部推演）以预演行动后果、明确的结果导向控制，以及多代理协调编排，它实现了更可靠和灵活的任务自动化。这一框架让AI代理能更自主地完成长期、多步骤目标，对构建实用智能助手至关重要。
items.title_en: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration

items.title: Deploying Claude across financial services
items.summary_en: The paper addresses the challenge of safely integrating large language models like Claude into the heavily regulated financial services sector. It details an approach that combines rigorous safety testing, compliance alignment, and domain-specific customization to ensure accurate, secure, and reliable outputs. This matters because it demonstrates a replicable pathway for leveraging advanced AI to enhance critical financial workflows—such as analysis, customer support, and risk assessment—while meeting strict regulatory standards.
items.summary_zh: 该报告探讨了将Claude模型部署到金融服务领域时面临的合规、数据隐私及安全性挑战。它提出了定制化的部署框架，强调通过严格的模型治理、安全对齐和私有化部署来满足行业监管要求。这对于推动生成式AI在高度受监管的金融行业中安全、可靠地应用具有关键指导意义。
items.title_en: Deploying Claude across financial services

items.title: How a non-technical project manager built and shipped a stress management app with Claude Code in six weeks
items.summary_en: A non-technical project manager leveraged Claude Code to single-handedly build and ship a stress management application in just six weeks, overcoming the barrier of lacking programming skills. The project demonstrates that AI-powered coding assistants can enable domain experts to rapidly prototype and deploy practical, self-contained software solutions without traditional development expertise. This highlights a shift toward democratized software creation, where individuals can directly address personal or niche needs with unprecedented speed and autonomy.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示了一位非技术背景的项目经理如何通过使用Claude Code，仅用六周时间就成功构建并发布了压力管理应用，解决了传统开发中非技术人员难以独立实现应用构想的问题。其关键方法在于利用AI编程助手将应用需求直接转化为可运行代码，大幅降低了开发门槛。这证实了AI工具能显著赋能非技术人员，加速创意落地，对产品原型验证和个性化工具开发具有重要意义。
items.title_en: How a non-technical project manager built and shipped a stress management app with Claude Code in six weeks

items.title: Building AI agents for the enterprise
items.summary_en: This work addresses the challenge of safely deploying autonomous AI agents within complex enterprise environments, where reliability, integration, and governance are critical. It presents a framework that combines large language models with structured tool use, memory, and guardrails to enable agents to execute multi-step business processes while maintaining control and transparency. This matters because it offers a practical path for organizations to leverage agent
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了企业构建AI代理的核心挑战，提出了一套结合模块化架构、安全治理与持续优化的框架，以实现代理在复杂业务场景中的可靠部署。通过强调人机协作与可解释性，该研究为企业落地自主决策系统提供了实用路径，对提升运营效率和降低风险具有重要意义。
items.title_en: Building AI agents for the enterprise

items.title: Claude Security is now in public beta
items.summary_en: The announcement of "Claude Security" entering public beta addresses the critical need to safeguard AI deployments against misuse, adversarial attacks, and unintended harmful outputs. By opening security-focused features for broader testing, it likely introduces enhanced guardrails, monitoring, or access controls that allow developers to assess and improve the robustness of their AI applications. This move matters because it democratizes access to enterprise-grade safety tools, helping to ensure responsible AI deployment at scale.
items.summary_zh: Claude Security 公测版旨在解决AI助手在企业部署中的安全与合规问题，通过提供增强的访问控制、数据保护和威胁检测功能来降低风险。该测试发布标志着AI安全工具向更广泛落地迈出关键一步，有助于加速生成式AI在敏感场景中的可信应用。
items.title_en: Claude Security is now in public beta

items.title: Lessons from building Claude Code: Prompt caching is everything
items.summary_en: The article distills key lessons from developing the Claude Code AI assistant, highlighting that implementing prompt caching was critical for making the tool fast and affordable. By caching and reusing computed representations of repetitive system prompts and conversation context, it drastically cut down on redundant computation, lowering latency and cost per interaction. This focus on caching is essential for building responsive, scalable AI developer tools that feel instantaneous in practice.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 的开发经验揭示了提示缓存的核心价值：通过缓存和复用之前计算的提示上下文，能大幅降低延迟与计算开销。这一方法显著提升了 AI 编码工具的响应效率，为优化开发者工作流和降低服务成本提供了关键思路。
items.title_en: Lessons from building Claude Code: Prompt caching is everything

items.title: How Kepler built verifiable AI for financial services with Claude
items.summary_en: Kepler tackled the lack of trust and auditability in AI for regulated financial services by developing a verifiable AI system built on Claude. Their approach enables transparent, evidence-backed outputs that can be validated against defined rules and reasoning, ensuring compliance. This matters because it allows financial institutions to safely deploy LLMs in high-stakes decisions, meeting strict regulatory requirements for accountability and risk management.
items.summary_zh: 该文章介绍了Kepler如何利用Claude模型为金融服务构建可验证的人工智能系统，解决了金融领域对AI输出结果的可审计性和可靠性要求。其关键方法是将Claude的推理能力与验证机制相结合，确保AI决策透明可追溯，从而在监管严格的金融行业实现可信部署。
items.title_en: How Kepler built verifiable AI for financial services with Claude

items.title: Deploying agentic AI across the enterprise with Claude Cowork
items.summary_en: The paper addresses the challenge of safely scaling autonomous AI agents across enterprise workflows, where coordination, reliability, and alignment with human values are critical. It introduces Claude Cowork, a framework that leverages Anthropic's Claude model to deploy collaborative, task-oriented AI agents that can reason, use tools, and interact with humans in a controlled manner. This matters because it provides a practical, safety-focused blueprint for integrating agentic AI into real-world business operations, potentially boosting productivity while mitigating risks.
items.summary_zh: 该内容探讨了如何通过Claude Cowork将具备自主行动能力的AI代理（Agentic AI）部署到整个企业环境中，解决当前AI助手在复杂工作流中协同性不足的问题。其关键方法是利用Claude的对话与推理能力，结合企业系统进行安全、可控的任务编排，使AI能从辅助工具升级为可执行多步骤业务操作的“同事”。这一方案的意义在于，它展示了一条将前沿大模型转化为可靠企业生产力的可行路径，有望显著提升自动化水平与决策效率。
items.title_en: Deploying agentic AI across the enterprise with Claude Cowork

items.title: Claude API skill now in CodeRabbit, JetBrains, Resolve AI, and Warp
items.summary_en: The announcement highlights the integration of Claude’s API into popular developer tools—CodeRabbit, JetBrains IDEs, Resolve AI, and Warp—expanding AI‑powered assistance directly into code review, coding, debugging, and terminal workflows. This makes advanced language model capabilities seamlessly available across the software development lifecycle, boosting productivity and reducing context switching.
items.summary_zh: Claude API现已集成至CodeRabbit、JetBrains、Resolve AI和Warp等主流开发工具中，解决了开发者需在不同平台间切换以获取AI辅助的问题。这一整合通过将Claude先进的语言理解能力直接嵌入代码审查、编辑与协作流程，显著提升了开发效率。
items.title_en: Claude API skill now in CodeRabbit, JetBrains, Resolve AI, and Warp

items.title: Product development in the agentic era
items.summary_en: This piece examines the shift in product development practices necessitated by the rise of autonomous AI agents. It likely proposes frameworks for designing, testing, and iterating on agentic systems where the product itself exhibits goal-driven behavior, rather than serving as a passive tool. This matters because traditional user-centered and deterministic software development methodologies may fail to address the unique challenges of controllability, alignment, and emergent interactions in agent-driven applications.
items.summary_zh: 标题《代理时代的产品开发》探讨AI代理（Agent）如何重塑产品研发流程。核心发现是，通过赋予AI自主决策与执行能力，可将传统线性开发转变为持续迭代的智能协作模式，显著提升效率与创新性。这一框架为企业应对快速变化的市场需求提供了可操作的新范式。
items.title_en: Product development in the agentic era

items.title: Onboarding Claude Code like a new developer: Lessons from 17 years of development
items.summary_en: The article addresses the challenge of integrating AI coding assistants into established development workflows by treating Claude Code like a junior developer. Drawing on 17 years of software engineering experience, it outlines practical strategies for onboarding—such as familiarizing the AI with codebase conventions, providing clear tasks, and using iterative feedback loops. This perspective helps teams maximize the assistant's productivity while maintaining code quality and consistency.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨如何像指导新入职的开发者那样引导 Claude Code 融入开发流程，借助作者 17 年开发经验提炼出一套入职策略，旨在提升人机协作效率与代码交付质量。
items.title_en: Onboarding Claude Code like a new developer: Lessons from 17 years of development

items.title: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
items.summary_en: Claude now integrates new connectors that allow it to interface directly with everyday services and devices, addressing the limitation of being confined to text-based interactions. The key approach involves linking the model to external APIs for tasks like scheduling, messaging, or smart home control, enabling real-world actions. This matters because it transforms Claude from a conversational agent into a proactive, context-aware assistant that can seamlessly execute practical tasks in users’ daily lives.
items.summary_zh: Claude 推出的新连接器功能旨在将 AI 融入日常生活场景，通过直接对接日历、邮件等常用工具，让模型能主动获取上下文并执行实际操作。这一改进解决了通用对话与真实任务脱节的问题，使得 AI 助手从被动问答升级为能主动管理日程、处理信息的生活协作者，显著提升了实用性和人机交互的自然度。
items.title_en: New connectors in Claude for everyday life

items.title: Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents
items.summary_en: The problem is that AI managed agents often lack persistent memory, limiting their ability to maintain context and continuity across interactions. This work introduces a built-in memory system for Claude Managed Agents, enabling them to store and recall information from past sessions natively. This advancement matters because it allows for more coherent, personalized, and autonomous agent behaviour, reducing the need for external memory hacks and improving long-term task performance.
items.summary_zh: Claude 受管代理的内置记忆功能旨在解决长期对话中上下文丢失的问题，它通过为代理持久化存储和调用关键信息，使其能跨会话保持连续认知。这一机制让代理能从历史交互中学习并适应用户偏好，从而提升复杂任务的协作效率与个性化体验。
items.title_en: Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents

items.title: Building agents that reach production systems with MCP
items.summary_en: The talk addresses the common failure of AI agents to transition from proof-of-concept to reliable production environments, identifying integration complexity and lack of standardized context handling as root causes. It proposes the Model Context Protocol (MCP) as a universal connector that lets agents dynamically discover and use tools, data, and APIs in a secure, vendor-agnostic way, dramatically simplifying deployment. This matters because it provides a repeatable blueprint for enterprises to build scalable, interoperable agent systems that can be safely embedded into existing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了如何让AI智能体真正落地到生产系统中，核心提出了模型上下文协议（MCP）作为标准交互框架，以解决智能体与外部工具、数据源之间的碎片化集成问题。通过统一上下文管理，MCP使智能体能够安全、可靠地调用各类资源，显著降低了将实验性代理转化为稳定生产级系统的工程复杂度与技术门槛。
items.title_en: Building agents that reach production systems with MCP

items.title: Meet the winners of our Built with Opus 4.6 Claude Code hackathon
items.summary_zh: 该文章报道了基于Opus 4.6和Claude Code举办的黑客马拉松获奖作品，展示了开发者如何利用先进AI编程工具快速构建创新应用。通过竞赛形式，突显了这些模型在简化开发流程、提升代码生成质量方面的实用价值，为AI辅助软件开发提供了新范例。
items.title_en: Meet the winners of our Built with Opus 4.6 Claude Code hackathon

items.title: Why We Switched From Claude Code to Codex
items.summary_en: The article discusses the shift from Claude Code to OpenAI's Codex after GPT-5.5 enabled it to catch up in AI-assisted work ("vibe coding"). The key finding is that a growth lead now spends 80% of his work time inside Codex, using it for diverse tasks like drafting plans from transcripts and rebuilding dashboards. This highlights Codex's rapid practical utility and its potential to reshape everyday workflows.
items.summary_zh: 文章以从Claude Code转向Codex的决策为切入点，揭示了AI编程工具竞争的关键在于谁能更好地融入实际工作流。核心发现是OpenAI凭借GPT-5.5和桌面应用，使Codex在短短几个月内从追赶者变为开发者的主要工作平台，例如团队成员80%的工作时间都用它来处理从市场策划到仪表板重建等复杂任务。这一转变标志着AI辅助编程已从“补位”升级为“心流编程”的核心支柱，直接影响未来工作方式的生产力范示。
items.title_en: Why We Switched From Claude Code to Codex

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.7-preview.2
items.summary_en: This release enhances efficiency and user control by caching file reads to avoid redundant operations and introducing a shared permission flow for tool executions. It also fixes the CLI to respect proxy settings, ensuring reliable connectivity in restricted network environments. These improvements make the coding assistant faster, more secure, and easier to deploy behind proxies.
items.summary_zh: 该版本通过新增文件读取缓存与未变更读取的短路机制，提升处理性能；修复了命令行接口中代理设置未生效的问题，并引入共享权限流程以增强工具执行的安全性。
items.title_en: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.7-preview.2

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.7-preview.1
items.summary_en: This release preview enhances Qwen-Code’s efficiency and configurability by introducing a file read cache that short-circuits unchanged reads, honoring proxy settings in the CLI, and adding a shared permission flow for tool execution. These changes reduce redundant I/O and network overhead while streamlining security approvals, making the development assistant more responsive and flexible for everyday use.
items.summary_zh: 此版本通过引入文件读取缓存和短路不变读取机制，显著优化了代码分析性能，避免了重复读取未变化的文件；同时修复了命令行工具对代理设置的遵守问题，并新增了工具执行的共享权限流程，提升了安全性和开发体验。这些改进对提升AI编程助手的响应速度与安全性至关重要。
items.title_en: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.7-preview.1

items.title: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.6-nightly.20260507.15342b893
items.summary_en: This nightly release improves Qwen Code's performance and developer experience. It introduces a file read cache that skips redundant reads when files haven't changed, reducing I/O overhead, and fixes CLI proxy support for restricted networks. A new shared permission flow for tool execution also streamlines multi-step operations, making the tool faster and more usable.
items.summary_zh: 本次更新通过引入文件读取缓存和短路机制，减少了重复读取未变更文件的操作，有效提升代码处理效率。同时修复了命令行代理设置问题并增加了共享权限流程，增强了网络兼容性与工具执行的安全性，使开发体验更稳定可靠。
items.title_en: QwenLM/qwen-code: Release v0.15.6-nightly.20260507.15342b893
